channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trolley filled with rubbish, 4th March
item.description:
Trolley filled with rubbish dumped on pavement. Near corner woldham and godwin road. Since yesterday
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chemical Rubbish, 4th March
item.description:
I live across from these and I just watched a local restauranter who dumped all of their restaurant waste into the bins filling them up. May this be reported and our bins emptied?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 4th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Hasn't moved for ages., 4th March
item.description:
Has a puncture Possibly stolen and abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone keeps littering and urinating in the lift., 4th March
item.description:
Someone is repeatedly urinating and leaving litter in the building lift, creating an unhygienic environment almost daily.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of general waste into field close recycling bins., 4th March
item.description:
For the last 2 weeks someone has been placing lots of bin bags of general waste into our recycling bins. We have to remove them and the foxes strewn the rubbish all over the rd and garage area. Within the bags there is boxes with their address on them which we have also sent a copy of to the local primary schools.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Field Close, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abondoned bin, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned bin left near road. Hazard for the public
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyatt Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole just before zebra crossing heading north, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole been there several weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haselbury Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole in centre of road between nos. 9 and 14 Alleyn Road, 4th March
item.description:
This pothole is in the same location as one repaired approx one year ago, i.e. the repair has failed. It is particularly dangerous for two wheeled vehicles, and in the rain it fills up making it less visible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping on Clapton Way further fly-tipping bricks & concrete., 4th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping on Clapton Way further fly-tipping bricks & concrete.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Close to flat 55, 4th March
item.description:
Customer has had private surveyors out and both reports confirm the tree is causing subsidence to the property an has caused a lot of cracks. i have also advised customer to report the matter to repairs asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45-61, Estelle Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pit for SD0/1 on Belsize road is full of detritus and sludge requires clearing out, 4th March
item.description:
Pit for SD0/1 on Belsize road is full of detritus and sludge requires clearing out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 264, Belsize Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin, 4th March
item.description:
Broken bin been there weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fling tipping, 4th March
item.description:
Household stuff have been fly tipped outside STANE way 18 and 16 in the communal area and they are eyesore to all general public and home owners in the area . Can you please arrange for them to be moved.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stane Way, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and bin bags around it, 4th March
item.description:
Overflowing bin and abandoned mixed bags around it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bottom half of winnington road from a1 to roundabout with Norrice lea, 4th March
item.description:
Insane potholes terrible Caused punctures twice in car Never gets fixed properly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Winnington Road, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nor road tax, no mot, 4th March
item.description:
Vehicle has no road tax and no MOT. Believe to be a abandoned vehicle that needs removal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox near bus stop NC on Hollydale Road, 4th March
item.description:
We stumbled upon a dead fox around 12.20pm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evelina Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: As seen in photo, 4th March
item.description:
Working is reform says no blacks Irish and gays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 279, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Litter picking please, 4th March
item.description:
On Glengall rd near the nursery and the church Lots of litter Please sweep as well

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reddins Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
